Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Mar-08-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant Imperfect Foods, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

There are no appearances in this matter.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted: Defendant's motion to compel arbitration is denied.

(See Word minutes this date for the Court's complete ruling.)

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported (302/EPS)
